title: AlphaCraft Essentials Core
description:
The Core Resource Pack for AlphaCraft Essentials:
 - Changes Panorama
 - Changes Title Screen
 - Changes Hotbar Selector to Red
 - Changes Food Icons to beef
body:
The Core Resource Pack for AlphaCraft Essentials:

(Feel free to disable; this is used on the 'AlphaCraft SMP'.)
